Name: Peppa Pig
Personality: A loud and energetic pig who is easily excited, curious, and playful. At times Peppa can be forgetful and bossy, and she can be rude and stubborn if she doesn't know any better, but she will apologize if she realizes she did something wrong. She has a temper at times, which usually only comes out if she fails at something or gets really annoyed with George.

Name: Alexander Pig
Personality: As he is only a baby, Baby Alexander doesn't have much of a personality. In the episode "The Noisy Night", it is shown that he loves noise and it is generally the thing that puts him to sleep. Because of this, he is not like other babies who do not like noisy things. However, in the episode “Staying Up Late”, Auntie Pig shushes Peppa and Chloe and says, “Baby Alexander is asleep. We don’t want to wake him.” So, that noisy thing might’ve just been for that one episode.

Name: Auntie Dottie
Personality: Auntie Dottie is sweet and caring, as seen in Horsey Twinkle Toes, when she sent a gift from far away to Peppa and George. She is also cheerful and kind, as seen in Thanksgiving, when she traveled a long way just to see her family and reunite with her niece and nephew. Despite being a good person, she is also a procrastinator because she waited until the last minute to tell Mummy Pig that she was taking a taxi to her house moments before showing up.

Name: Tooth Fairy
Personality: No description available

Name: Rebecca Rabbit
Personality: Rebecca is a bubbly and energetic rabbit. She likes spending time with Peppa and her friends and enjoys swimming, dancing, and playing dress-up. In Not Very Well, she, Suzy, and Danny come to visit Peppa when she is ill, and in Foggy Day, she rides the swing with Peppa at the playground. Despite being outgoing, Rebecca is also shy in some instances. In Fancy Dress Party, when Peppa awards her costume as the best, her face turns red. In School Play, when she blushes when she says her line while practicing, and many times, turns red in the face, whenever carrots are mentioned. Rebecca can also be a bit mean sometimes, as seen in Ice Skating, when she and the rest of her friends laugh at Peppa when she slips on the ice, and in George's Friend, she gets mad at Peppa for George knocking over Richard's sandcastle. She is good at trilling her lips, and uses it as her talent in Talent Day. She is good at sports, as seen in Gym Class and Miss Rabbit's Relaxation Class, and she won a trophy for winning a running race in Sports Day. This can infer that Rebecca is good at sports, and she may participate in sports programs or attend classes.

Name: Richard Rabbit
Personality: Richard Rabbit acts like the other toddlers in the series. He is often seen with his best friend George and their other toddler friends, as well as the group. Richard has a stuffed toy dinosaur just like George, but it is red instead of green.

Name: Grandpa Pig
Personality: Grandpa Pig is rather seen often as a showcaser or tutorialist, and he has a huge hatred towards animals eating his seeds and/or vegetables. He also doesn't like other stuff like gnomes, broken computers, etcetera, and he can be often disappointed at his failed attempts. Other than that, he's positive towards his grandkids.

Name: Mummy Pig
Personality: Mummy Pig is a kind and responsible adult, who is more proactive and wittier than Daddy Pig. Being a more mature adult, she often tries to warn Daddy Pig when he may be doing something he shouldn't be. She is street-smart, as seen in Fun Fair, when she breaks a strength record in anger of Mr. Bull for calling Daddy Pig "round in the tummy." She enjoys drinking tea, dancing, and relaxing with her friends. Despite being a good person, she can also be a bit instinctive and thoughtless, such as when she simply just laughed at Peppa and Suzy when they had a fight instead of asking them what happened. She can also be a bit uncontrollable, as seen in Trampolines, when she bounced into a tree due to not being aware of her surroundings. She is afraid of spiders, as revealed in Mister Skinnylegs.

Name: George Pig
Personality: As noted above, George is a kind, gentle pig who is always keen to look up to his older sister to grow up big and strong like she does. While Peppa can be a bit mean and bossy towards him (such as leaving him out of games), she still loves him all the same, and is always happy to help him whenever something goes wrong.

Name: Evie Pig
Personality: Being a baby, Evie doesn't have much of a personality, but she is shown to be quite a happy girl. Like all babies, she cries when she needs something and doesn't speak.

Name: Daddy Rabbit
Personality: Daddy Rabbit is a wise, intelligent, and generous rabbit. He is good at describing and teaching more complicated subjects. In Mummy Rabbit's Bump, Mr. Rabbit provides support for Mummy Rabbit by opening the car door for her. Later on, after eating a funny mixture of food, she announces that the baby is coming, so Daddy Rabbit rushes the family to the hospital. He struggles to park the car in time and is devastated by the fact that he missed seeing the baby twins being born, but is overjoyed that they are finally here. Daddy Rabbit is also curious, as seen in Grandpa Pig's Pond, when he asked Grandpa Pig where he dug up such artifacts that he put in the museum. He is interested in antiques and vintage items, and often looks for things to add to the museum collection. In Rebecca Rabbit, George refuses to eat carrots, so Daddy Rabbit eases him into it by telling him that he thought he was a rabbit, and in Paper Aeroplanes, he compliments Daddy Pig on his unintentional way of sending important documents by making them into paper aeroplanes.

Name: Uncle Pig
Personality: Uncle Pig loves to play and have fun with his family, but he's more mature than Daddy Pig, since he's wiser.

Name: Grampy Rabbit
Personality: Grampy Rabbit is a kind, well-meaning rabbit. He is generous and helps people with their problems. In Doctor Hamster's Big Present, he makes Doctor Hamster a hamster wheel upon learning that she does not have the time or space to get fit and healthy. In Grampy Rabbit's Lighthouse, he keeps a big light on at night for sailors to find their way in the dark, and shouts in a foghorn on foggy days. However, Grampy Rabbit can also be absent-minded and sometimes refuses to follow the rules. An example of this can be seen in Jukebox and Grampy Rabbit's Hovercraft, when he entered sailing clubhouse property without having a  membership, claiming that his excuse for it was that he was with Grandpa Pig, who had a membership at the sailing club. In Space Adventure!, when he took Peppa, George, Granny Pig, Granny Dog, and Madame Gazelle to the moon, not realizing that it was just supposed to be a pretend game. In The Lifeboat, he forgets to take his cell phone with him on a sailing trip and eventually becomes stranded on the sea during a storm.

Name: Daddy Pig
Personality: Daddy Pig is a sweet, caring, hyperactive, fun-loving, and clumsy dad. He always supports what Peppa and George want, and goes out of his way to make sure they feel special. He does not tell his children when he disagrees with something they say or do, as he believes that they are too young to understand. In Father's Day, Peppa and George make a ketchup-flavored cake for him, which he pretends to like, and in When I Grow Up, he supports Peppa's dream of being a puddle jumping champion when she grows up. He consoles Peppa in Jumping Stick when she becomes frustrated over not being able to properly use his jumping stick. He is almost never strict with Peppa, but this can be seen in a few episodes. In Bicycles, he has a talk with Peppa when she accidentally crashes into his giant pumpkin, and in The Market, he initially says no to her when she asks him to buy her a singing fish toy.

Name: Mummy Rabbit
Personality: Mummy Rabbit is a calm, caring, and kind rabbit. She cares a lot for her family and was willing to go through the trouble in helping her sister do her difficult jobs when she was injured in Miss Rabbit's Day Off. However, despite her being nice, Mummy Rabbit is also absent-minded and sometimes unaware of how to handle situations. This can be seen in Mummy Rabbit's Bump, when she ate a funny mixture of food at Peppa's house minutes before realizing she would be going into labor. Another example that shows this is in Miss Rabbit's Day Off, when she wasn't strict enough about asking Rebecca and Richard to put away all their toys. As a result, Miss Rabbit injures herself after tripping over Richard's toy car. Being the mother of four children, Mummy Rabbit is very motherly and often knows how to take care of children.

Name: Auntie Pig
Personality: Aunty Pig is very friendly, fun-loving, calm and dreamer. She is much like her co-sister-in-law Mummy Pig.

Name: Chloé Pig
Personality: Chloé appears to be around ten years old and acts like a grown up. She will only accept playing "baby games" if someone younger like George wanted play them. She gets along with her cousins and has two best friends, Belinda Bear and Simon Squirrel. She knows how to make daisy chains, lion manes, and construction paper dolls by filling up the spaces.

Name: Suzy Sheep
Personality: Suzy Sheep is kind, caring, supportive, and inclusive, which makes her a good friend. In Flying on Holiday, she rings the doorbell multiple times hoping to see Peppa home from her vacation. In Pumpkin Competition, when the playgroup must start an evening pumpkin contest without Peppa, Suzy expresses sadness. However, in School Camp, Suzy asks to camp with the other girls from playgroup instead of Peppa, and near the end of the episode, she becomes scared after hearing an owl near her tent and rushes to Madame Gazelle's tent without telling Peppa. She has a bossy side, which can be seen in multiple episodes. In Chatterbox, she bullies Peppa over not being able to be silent, and argues with the playgroup in International Day. She is easily annoyed and likes to take control of situations. In When I Grow Up, Suzy shares that she would like to be a nurse to help sick people get better, and also to tell people what to do. She communicates by using M's instead of B's while bleating.

Name: Granny Pig
Personality: Granny Pig is a kindhearted and caring grandmother. She always tries to accommodate Peppa and George and enjoys spending time with them. She likes wearing perfume, cooking, shopping, and relaxing. In Perfume, she teaches Peppa how to make her own perfume, and in Treasure Hunt, she creates a treasure hunt for Peppa and George. She likes strawberries, as seen in Strawberries. She is often casual and does not spend as much time thinking about the future as Grandpa Pig does. Granny Pig has a lot of friends and often likes to throw parties. She also likes dancing and drinking tea. Granny Pig's favorite type of music is rock and roll, as revealed in Jukebox.

Name: Rosie and Robbie Rabbit
Personality: No description available

Name: Mademoiselle Lapin
Personality: Like Miss Rabbit, Mademoiselle Lapin is hardworking, dilligent, and quick to do things, as seen when she hurriedly rescues Daddy Pig. However, she is also feisty, as seen when she reacts irritated to Mummy Pig when she mistakens her for Miss Rabbit. She also acts confused and unaware of the name "Miss Rabbit," which could imply that she may not know about the Miss Rabbit from Peppatown.

Name: Charlotte Sheep
Personality: Charlotte Sheep is a friendly babysitter who gets along well with her cousin Suzy and happily takes care of her and Peppa while telling them she's seventeen and tells the girls that when they grow up they'll be able of doing things like driving a car or staying up late.

Name: Mrs. Leopard
Personality: Mrs. Leopard is kindhearted, supportive, and friendly. She expresses excitement over being able to help Mrs. Cow choose a wedding dress. She is passionate about wearing presentable clothes, being a dressmaker. Mrs. Leopard is sweet to children, which is seen when she lets Peppa help her cut fabric. However, she can also be a bit careless and strict. When Mrs. Cow returned her wedding dress, Mrs. Leopard accidentally cut into it, unaware of the damage that she did to the dress. Mrs. Leopard can be strict when it comes to bringing tea.

Name: Daddy Cat
Personality: Daddy Cat is like the other fathers in the series. He also really likes fish, as does his wife and Candy. Also, he likes to climb trees, which in an instance left him stuck and in need of being rescued by Police Officer Squirrel and Police Officer Panda in the episode Police Car.

Name: Mummy Sheep
Personality: Mummy Sheep is polite and willing to do whatever her daughter wants. Despite going to the gym, she gets easily tired, as seen in Families. She can get easily panicked, as seen in School Project, when she realizes she has to help Suzy with a craft project for playgroup, and be short-tempered, as seen in Granny Sheep Moves In, when her mother makes her carry a bunch of boxes at once. She dislikes balls and noisy areas, as seen in Garden Games and Racquet Games, when a ball falls into her tea in both episodes. Sometimes, Mummy Sheep likes to be childish, as seen in Trampolines, when she spontaneously starts jumping on the children's trampolines. She tries to avoid spending too much money and buying too many toys. On rare occasions, she can be rude and gossip, as seen in Suzy Goes Away, when she complains to Mummy Pig that where they live is boring. She also talks excitedly about moving in the episode and tells Mummy Pig like it is official, even though she does not even know if she has gotten the job to even move, and at the end of the episode, she realizes she did not get the job. This indicates her absent-mindedness.

Name: Granny Sheep
Personality: Granny Sheep is a wise and passionate old lady. She is creative and sweet to children, as revealed in Cardboard Boxes, when she helps Suzy and her friends make crafts and games with cardboard boxes. She has a strong interest in art, as revealed in Art House Day, where she attends an art house fair and even features her own artwork. She explains in detail how she created each piece and expresses emotion when describing them.

Name: Mummy Cat
Personality: Mummy Cat is social and prefers spending time in other places and trying new things than trying watching television at home. This can be inferred by her in The Aquarium. She is also seen in Party Bus, when she supervised Candy's friends at her birthday party. She is a good seller and sold one of each type of fish in a crate to the pig family.

Name: Balloon Cat
Personality: No description available

Name: Candy Cat
Personality: Candy is friendly and kind. Like the others, she loves to try new things and enjoys all sorts of activities - like playing a sport, having a tea party, or just going out to the beach or town. She is also highly curious.

Name: Granddad Dog
Personality: Granddad Dog appears to be smart and intelligent that he takes over his son's place in 3 seasons, with a knowledge in both sea-related things and mechanic work. He has a bit of a short temper when dealing with the other grandfathers, and sometimes bickers with Grandpa Pig and insults his skills as a captain - as Grandpa Pig does with him, but he cares a great deal about his friend. He is also kind to the other characters.

Name: Danny Dog
Personality: Danny Dog is kind, inclusive, and a little bit rambunctious.

Name: Granny Dog
Personality: TBA

Name: Mrs Corgi
Personality: Mrs. Corgi shares similar personality traits with Mr. Stallion. She likes to give advice and brag about her abilities, such as spotting a rare bird and scoring a hole-in-one in golf. She also likes to be unique by dancing like a robot in Jukebox. She is not very easygoing and often critizes people. In Jukebox, she complains about Mr. Stallion's choice of music, and in Grampy Rabbit's Hovercraft, she accuses Grampy Rabbit's hovercraft of making noise and disturbing her peaceful day at sea.

Name: Mr. Labrador
Personality: Mr. Labrador is loyal, assertive, and friendly. He enjoys singing, drinking tea, eating ice cream, and digging up the road.

Name: Mr. Coyote
Personality: He is shown to be a kind dog although he did complain that the square dancing was too loud in The Diner.

Name: Mummy Pony
Personality: Mummy Pony is a caring, kind, and concerned mother. She cares about her son's well-being and always looks out for him. She knows when to be strict, as seen in Pirate Treasure, when she asks Pedro where he kept his glasses, and scolds him when he tells her a code word instead of properly answering her. In Pedro is Late, she runs into Pedro's room in the morning and rushes him to get up for a school trip. She manages to stop the school bus by chasing after it in her car. Mummy Pony's determination makes her a caring and responsible mother. She is also patient and almost never gets mad at Pedro for not remembering to wake up on time for his duties. In School Play, she helps Pedro practice his lines for a school play the class was rehearsing for.

Name: Pedro Pony
Personality: Pedro Pony is a friendly pony. He is best friends with Danny Dog. He is somewhat smart in his fields of interest, but otherwise appears to be a bit naive and scatterbrained, as shown in some episodes when he gets the wrong fancy dress costume to an occasion, for example, in Danny's Pirate Party when he arrived to a pirate themed party dressed as a cowboy and in Gym Class, he wore a superhero costume instead of his gym kit.

Name: Zoë Zebra
Personality: Zoë Zebra is a friendly zebra who appears to be generally nice and a bit quiet. But, she sometimes doesn't pay attention to others and can misbehave in her own environment; as shown when she changed the television without asking Daddy Zebra's permission, or not allowing Zuzu and Zaza to join her slumber party until the other girls convinced her they can stay in the sitting room. However, she seems to get along well with her little sisters, and friends compared to Peppa's relationship with George.

Name: Mr. Stallion
Personality: Mr. Stallion shares similar personality traits with Mrs. Corgi. He likes to give advice and show off his abilities, such as sailing professionally on his boat and scoring a hole-in-one in golf. He is also stubborn as revealed in Jukebox, where he criticized Granny Pig's choice of music, rock and roll, and switched it to disco. He is also irresponsible as revealed in Police Car, where his car engine stopped, revealing that he did not take it to fill up on gas soon enough before the engine stopped. He is often excited to see Grandpa Pig and has a loud voice.

Name: Daddy Dog
Personality: One with the waters, Captain Dog loves to be out on the sea; exploring and searching for riches and fishes. He doesn't know what to do with himself whenever he is away from it and shows signs of missing his time out dearly. However, he also adores his family and is happy to see them whenever he can, although he has to be reminded not to leave.

Name: Mummy Zebra
Personality: Mummy Zebra is a caring, sweet, friendly, but strict mother. She always supports what her children want and dedicates her time to helping them make a pottery set in Pottery. In The Park, she is seen with Zoë Zebra looking at the ducks in the park. In Sleepover, she trusts Zoë to be alone with her friends and not cause trouble or be too loud during a girls sleepover, but becomes angry when they make a lot of noise and ignore her rules. Mummy Zebra is patient and provides a solution to Peppa when she gets frustrated over not being able to professionally do pottery. She is very supportive, even of other children, and compliments George's clay dinosaur.

Name: Zuzu & Zaza Zebra
Personality: As toddlers, they are a lot like the others. They appear to be younger than the others, but despite that, they are quite energetic and playful and enjoy spending time with their older sister when they're not playing with each other or the other toddlers. They are regarded as sweet by Peppa and her friends.

Name: Grandpa Zebra
Personality: No description available

Name: Daddy Zebra
Personality: Daddy Zebra is kind, caring, and always willing to help. He cares about his job, as seen in Zoë Zebra the Postman's Daughter, when he passionately delivered all of Zoe's birthday invitations to his house. His generosity can be seen in The Toy Cupboard, when he offered to build the pig family's toy cupboard for them. He is competitive when playing sports, and knows how to calm children down, as seen in Sleepover.

Name: Mummy Dog
Personality: Mummy Dog is kindhearted, hardworking and supportive. She is also a bit frightened, as seen in School Play, when Granddad Dog scares her while pretending to be the Big Bad Wolf from Little Red Riding Hood. Her kindness is seen in Canal Boat, when she surprises Captain Dog with a canal boat trip for his birthday, and in Danny's Pirate Bedroom, she helps Danny and Captain Dog redecorate Danny's room. She is hardworking as a firefighter, as seen in The Fire Engine, where she turns on the hose during a fire, and in Fire Station Practice, where she runs an obstacle course with the other mummies. She is also good at solving problems, as seen in Danny's Pirate Party, when she stops Grandpa Pig and Granddad Dog's argument by thanking them for planning Danny's birthday party.

Name: Mr. Pony
Personality: Mr. Pony is an optician visited by others to get their eyes tested. In his spare time, he is also part of Daddy Pig's football team. He has a Scottish accent.

Name: Granny Zebra
Personality: TBA

Name: Emily Elephant
Personality: Emily is shown to be kind and gentle. She doesn't speak much due to being shy. In her debut episode Emily Elephant, Emily is shy when she arrives at playgroup and doesn't say anything to anyone, though she plays games with the children and fascinates them with her ability to use her trunk (revealing to be the loudest in the loudest game). She enjoys jumping in muddy puddles and most other things that the other children like doing. In Sleepover, she participates in a storytelling game with the girls and overcomes her shyness by making a loud trumpet sound with her trunk. She is not a fan of dancing on her own, as revealed in Shake, Rattle and Bang, when Madame Gazelle shows her how to play the castanets while dancing, when Emily asks if the dancing can be skipped. She enjoys hiking and exploring with her family, as seen in Around the World with Peppa and The Flying Vet. Emily enjoys trying new things, as seen in Peppa's Circus, when she attempts to juggle. Despite being shy, Emily has musical talent, as revealed in Talent Day, when she can play the recorder really well. Sometimes, Emily boasts about Edmond's cleverness, such as in Science Museum, though most of the time she does not say anything when he speaks intelligently.

Name: Delphine Donkey
Personality: No description available

Name: Mrs. Donkey
Personality: No description available

Name: Mummy Elephant
Personality: Mummy Elephant is a caring and hard-working mother. She throws a house party for her son in Edmond Elephant's Birthday and prepares games, orders, food, and invites guests. She is calm and patient, making her a good mother. In Winter Games, she takes Edmond and his friends' skiing on Snowy Mountain. Like Edmond, Mummy Elephant has an interest in science and enjoys outdoor activities such as hiking, as revealed in The Flying Vet and Around the World with Peppa.

Name: Granddad Elephant
Personality: Granddad Elephant is calm, well-mannered, and excited over little things, such as tea, and drinking it with others. He is polite and gets along well with the other elderlies at the charity shop.

Name: Edmond Elephant
Personality: Edmond Elephant is surprisingly clever and intelligent, especially for a younger kid. He is proud of his nickname "clever clogs" and often smiles big when people call him it. Although he likes this name, he sometimes wishes to be called "child prodigy," as seen in Children's Festival. Besides being witty, Edmond is also caring, helpful, and unafraid to take risks. In The Flying Vet, he expresses concern over seeing a sick gecko. In Going Boating, he helps his family row their boat in a boating race. His carefree nature is seen in Science Museum, when he leisurely agrees to take a dangerous ride, not caring about the dangers of it or getting hurt. Edmond is generally a happy and fascinated person, though sometimes he can be sensitive. Examples of this are seen in Edmond Elephant's Birthday, when he cries over not winning a party game, and in Spring, when he cries with his friends over not finding any chocolate eggs during an egg hunt. He also cries in International Day, when Suzy Sheep and Zoë Zebra attempt to take the sandpit from him and his friends.

Name: Monsieur Donkey
Personality: No description available

Name: Didier Donkey
Personality: Didier is kind and friendly. He has a love of dinosaurs, much to George's excitement. When he meets Peppa and George, he plays with them, along with his sister, Delphine. He enjoys spending time with new people.

Name: Granny Elephant
Personality: TBA

Name: Kylie Kangaroo
Personality: No description available

Name: Daddy Fox
Personality: Generous and kind, Mr. Fox is always willing to give someone an item - as long as he brought it with him or hadn't sold out of it yet. He is friendly and seems to enjoy taking late night strolls during the evening. He is also a decent seller, willing to accept a payment of buttons from George, instead of actual money.

Name: Joey Kangaroo
Personality: Joey Kangaroo is too little to do much of a personality. He may possibly be shy, since he stays in Miss Kangaroo's pouch all of the time.

Name: Daddy Kangaroo
Personality: Not much is known about Mr. Kangaroo, he seems very jolly, funny and caring.

Name: Mummy Kangaroo
Personality: Mrs. Kangaroo is Kylie Kangaroo and Joey's mother.

Name: Freddy Fox
Personality: Freddy is a sweet, friendly, and clever fox.

Name: Mrs Fox
Personality: Mummy Fox is shown to have a somewhat stern personality with her patients at work.

Name: Mr. Wolf
Personality: Details may not be final.

Name: Wendy Wolf
Personality: Wendy Wolf is a friendly child who gets along with the other children. She is normally only seen with the playgroup and has a lot of fun with them. She seems to be a little like Rebecca, in that she is a bit more quiet than some of the others, and she also appears to be a bit knowledgeable on certain subjects. She is also seen when making her first debut in Season 4.

Name: Granny Wolf
Personality: No description available

Name: Grandma Cow
Personality: TBA

Name: Mr. Bull's Brother
Personality: Mr. Bull's Brother's personality is the same as his brother's personality, he is very loud and energetic.

Name: Mr. Bull
Personality: Mr. Bull is polite, kind, easygoing, and considerate. In Digger World, when Peppa accidentally knocks down his bricks, he does not get angry at her and instead chuckles, understanding that she did not intend to do it. In Mr. Bull in a China Shop, he decides to repay Miss Rabbit by fixing a pothole in her road after she fixed his teapot. Despite being kind, Mr. Bull can also be a bit uncontrollable. This is seen with his obsession in digging up roads, even if they don't have to be dug up. Mr. Bull is also shown to be absent-minded, as seen in Mr. Bull is Getting Married!, where he casually tells Madame Gazelle that he is getting married, not believing it to be a big deal. Mr. Bull is also shown to be a bit inconsiderate and rude, as seen in Funfair, when he fat shames Daddy Pig, much to Mummy Pig's anger.

Name: Mime Bull
Personality: TBA

Name: Mrs. Wolf
Personality: TBA

Name: Mr. Rhinoceros
Personality: Mr. Rhinoceros is a grey rhinoceros who is one of Mr. Bull's workers... more TBA

Name: Mrs Cow
Personality: Mrs. Cow is responsible, calm, and hardworking. She knows a lot about children, being a children's nurse. She is accommodating, as seen in Hospital, when she stops her duties just to scratch Pedro's ear. However, she can also be snappy and impatient sometimes, as seen in The Lifeboat, when she asks Grampy Rabbit why he took so long to come to her cheese shop. In Getting Ready for the Wedding!, she cries emotionally when trying on a dress for her wedding. Mrs. Cow likes tent dresses and the color golden yellow. She also likes the stench of smelly cheese. In Naughty Tortoise, she gets stuck in a tree trying to rescue Tiddles the Tortoise, much to her frustration. She may be a fan of Mr. Potato because she showed up to see him when he came to town for a special appearance, as seen in Mr. Potato Comes to Town.

Name: Carol Cow
Personality: No description available

Name: Rohan Rhinoceros
Personality: Rohan is a kind-hearted and friendly rhino who enjoys spending time with others. He also likes shopping, swimming, and watching shows.

Name: Clemens Cow
Personality: No description available

Name: Signor Goat (Daddy)
Personality: He's like the other fathers in the show.

Name: Grandpa Rhinoceros
Personality: No description available

Name: Frau Cow
Personality: No description available

Name: Gertrude Goat (Mummy)
Personality: No description available

Name: Gabriella Goat
Personality: Gabriella is a kindhearted and friendly goat. This is seen in Holiday in the Sun, when she introduces herself to the pig family and teaches them, specifically Peppa, about Italian traditions, such as what they like to eat. She helps Peppa choose a postcard to write to Goldie when she hears that she misses her. Later on in the episode, after the pig family leave the local village, Gabriella tells her father that Peppa forgot Teddy. She kindly gives Teddy to a police officer, who returns it to her. In The End of the Holiday, Gabriella waves the pig family goodbye as they leave the vacation house. She also discovers once again that Peppa forgot Teddy, and she gives it back to the police officer, who returns it back to Peppa.

Name: Mrs. Rhinoceros
Personality: TBA

Name: Aunty Goat
Personality: Aunty Goat is a passionate and caring seller, as seen when she angrily snaps at Daddy Pig for teasing her store. It is implied that she has a healthy relationship with Gabriella, Uncle Goat, and Signor Goat.

Name: Birgit's Dad
Personality: No description available

Name: Mummy Bear
Personality: Linda Bear is caring to people.

Name: Birgit's Mother
Personality: No description available

Name: Uncle Goat
Personality: Uncle Goat is an enthusiastic chef who enjoys his job. In Holiday in the Sun, he enthusiastically announced the ingredients as he prepared a pizza. He also seems to be quite fond of compliments, as he was satisfied and honored that Daddy Pig, out of everyone, enjoyed his pizza the most.

Name: Gerald Giraffe
Personality: Gerald Giraffe is friendly, caring, and helpful. He is friends with the children at playgroup and can get along with them pretty well. Being tall, he is also good at helping others take down things from high surfaces. He also once rescued Tiddles the Tortoise from a treetop for Doctor Hamster. Sometimes, though, Gerald can be embarrassed or feel different being the tallest because this means he cannot do a lot of things the same way that his friends can. In Art House Day, he offers Peppa and Suzy cheeseballs as a snack. Gerald can be a bit shy sometimes and dislikes hide-and-seek because of his height.

Name: Birgit Bear
Personality: No description available

Name: Mummy Mole
Personality: No description available

Name: Baby Bear
Personality: No description available

Name: Daddy Giraffe
Personality: TBA

Name: Belinda Bear
Personality: Belinda is slightly moody, a bit careless, but also caring and kind. In Chloé's Big Friends, she nicknames George "Geh" (pronounced Juh) and calls him and Peppa "little." She also thinks that children's music is "babyish," as revealed in Chloé's Big Friends and Roller Disco. She seems to act mature for her age, especially since she is only a few years older than Peppa. Her kindness is seen in a few episodes. In Once Upon a Time, she asks Peppa if she would like to have lunch with her family, and in Skateboarding, she gives Peppa a skateboarding lesson. Throughout the lesson, she also asks Peppa if she is feeling okay or if she needs assistance, which proves that she is caring. Belinda is good at following directions and likes to be part of any games that her friends play.

Name: Mummy Giraffe
Personality: Mummy Giraffe seems to be like the other mothers in the series.

Name: Grandpa Girraffe
Personality: Grandpa Giraffe is shown to be caring, since he made tea for everyone at the antique shop. He is also shown to be a good seller after he offered Daddy Pig a complete set of old books from the time period of 1956, which he bought.

Name: Molly Mole
Personality: TBA

Name: Daddy Mole
Personality: No description available

Name: Mr. Lion
Personality: Mr. Lion is shown to be kind and caring towards his friends, as seen in his debut episode where he generously gave Peppa and her friends lunch boxes. His position at the zoo as zookeeper indicates that Mr. Lion has a love for animals.

Name: Peggi and Pandora Panda
Personality: No description available

Name: Leo Lion
Personality: Leo Lion is Suzy's friend, created in the episode "Pretend Friend". His personality isn't fully defined as he is made up by Suzy, Peppa, George, Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig as they go along. Though it is said he likes dress up and jumping in muddy puddles. He might also have a short temper, as seen when he roars at George for sitting on his chair, but he also has a soft heart as he gives his cake to George as an apology for scaring him.

Name: Mrs. Lion
Personality: TBA

Name: Mummy Panda
Personality: No description available

Name: PC Panda
Personality: Police Officer Panda is a hard-working panda. He is caring of his daughters, as seen in The Panda Twins, when he phoned Madame Gazelle to ask how Peggi and Pandora were doing. Though he acts sophisticated, sometimes he may be clueless or uncertain. An example of this is seen in Police Station, when he carelessly drops coins in an underground tunnel. He can also be irresponsible sometimes, as seen in Families, when he turns on the siren in his police car for Mummy Panda and his daughters, despite it not being an emergency. Police Officer Panda works well with Police Officer Squirrel female.

Name: Mummy Mouse
Personality: She is very caring.

Name: Larenzo Lion (character)
Personality: Larenzo is kind-hearted friendly and playful.

Name: Daddy Mouse
Personality: Daddy Mouse is a caring and inclusive dad, as seen in Familes, when he plays ball with Mandy and her mummy.

Name: Mummy Llama
Personality: Mummy Llama is kind and caring, and always worries for Lotte. She is sweet and gentle towards children when she is seen talking to Peppa after she tells her she can speak full German. Mummy Llama also has a sense of humor as revealed when she was seen laughing at Daddy Pig when he admitted that he spoke the wrong German words when asking for petrol in a foreign country. It can be inferred that she is social and enjoys spending time with others.

Name: Mandy Mouse
Personality: Most episodes show her as a cheerful, playful, friendly, energetic, kind-spirited and friendly girl. She’s also quite smart due as she explains certain things her friends such as getting married in the episode "Mr. Bull Is Getting Married!".

Name: Doctora Polar Bear
Personality: Doctor Polar Bear is caring, polite, and sweet to children, making her a good pediatrician. She supports people's interests and always knows how to lighten up the mood. She is also an honest person, as revealed in Health Check, when she admitted to liking broccoli "a little bit." In Igloo, she compliments the pig family's igloo, which shows her kindness. Doctor Polar Bear is very social and likes to participate in the activities that her friends do.

Name: Mummy Polar Bear
Personality: Mummy Polar Bear is a kind and caring mother. She supports Penny and always tries to accommodate her, and she enjoys making her and Doctora Polar Bear their favorite food: spaghetti. In the Clubhouse Saga, she participates in the children's games to cheer Penny up. In Igloo, she praises the pig family's igloo, which shows her kindness towards other people as well. Mummy Polar Bear has a similar personality to Doctora Polar Bear.

Name: Madame Gazelle
Personality: Madame Gazelle is kindhearted, inclusive, brave, and outgoing. She cares about her children and always tries to accommodate them, and she often tells them stories about teaching their mummies and daddies when they were little. In Mr. Bull is Getting Married!, Madame Gazelle notifies the town to help out Mr. Bull when she discovers that he is getting married. In Numbers, she includes Daddy Pig in their activity when he shows up to playgroup too early, and in School Camp, she sings to the children when they cannot sleep at night. She is also lazy, as seen in Kiddie Workout!, when she initially refuses to exercise. Despite being a nice teacher, Madame Gazelle can sometimes be stern. An example of this can be seen in Move to Music, when she refuses to make the radio "go wrong again." She can also become snappy and impatient when she cannot do something. This is seen in The Panda Twins, when she is unable to find her phone in the classroom.

Name: Simon Squirrel
Personality: Simon seems to be fooled easily, shown when Peppa tricked him into saying "yes" on the first question (do you want to play, then) in the Yes No game. This is also shown when Peppa, George, Chloé and Belinda surprised him by jumping out of the bush they were hiding in. And they listen the song "Head, Shoulders, Knees & Toes".

Name: Dra Hamster
Personality: Mrs. Hamster is a gentle and kind caretaker who loves animals. She knows many things about them and is well-respected by others. She appears to be soft-spoken and speaks with a Northern England accent. When she's not treating animals, Doctor Hamster can often be found looking for Tiddles, who escapes carelessly and likes to climb trees unattended. She is very wise and knows how to handle situations involving animals. Her exhaustion in treating pets is revealed in A Day with Doctor Hamster, where she closes her office to those still in the waiting room due to her lack of energy to continue working. She enjoys talking to children like Peppa and her friends and sometimes visits the playgroup to talk about animals.

Name: Lotte Llama
Personality: Lotte is a kind and friendly llama. When she sees Peppa watching her, she goes and says hi to her. She talks to the children and answers all their questions, which proves her friendliness and kindness. Lotte is also quite proud of being able to speak German and is also a good teacher because all the children knew how to speak basic German by the end of the episode at playgroup. She also has a way of making things fun, like during recess, she showed the children a fun way of learning German numbers by playing hopscotch. Even though she enjoyed the attention, Lotte was a bit shy at first to see all the new children and at a new playgroup, but she was quick to open up to everyone.

Name: Police Officer Squirrel
Personality: Police Officer Squirrel female is a hard worker, working in the police force alongside Police Officer Panda.

Name: Gretel Gazelle
Personality: She and her sister Greta are kind and sweet. When their teacher sister Madame Gazelle is in a negative situation, she seems to get worried about her. The sisters also love playing rock music.

Name: Mr Hamster
Personality: No description available

Name: Mr Wallaby
Personality: Mr. Wallaby is very polite, friendly, and understanding. In Boomerang, when Daddy Kangaroo demonstrates how to throw a boomerang, he accidentally smashes one of Mr. Wallaby's windows, to which Mr. Wallaby assures is okay. Daddy Pig then has a go with throwing the boomerang, but ends up smashing another one of his windows. Mr. Wallaby then demonstrates how to throw the boomerang, but ends up smashing his last window, leaving him speechless. Daddy Kangaroo reacts to this hastily, apologizing but assuring that they must go. Mr. Wallaby immediately forgives them, despite the damages he must pay for his broken windows.

Name: Mr. Pademelon
Personality: No description available

Name: Mr. Buffalo
Personality: Mr. Buffalo is shown to be kind and helpful as shown when he points the points the pigs in the right direction to Hollywood.

Name: Mr. Hyrax
Personality: Mr. Hyrax is very distinctive and likes to play by the rules. In Jukebox, he was hesitant when Grampy Rabbit entered the sailing clubhouse without a membership card, and in Grandpa Pig's Birthday, he was confused by Peppa's requests but accommodated them. He is also a softie, as seen when he let the pig family into TV land even though they weren't supposed to be in the studio.

Name: Mrs Crocodile
Personality: Mrs. Crocodile is responsible, caring, and helpful. In The Zoo, she introduced the penguins to the children and let them watch her feed them. In Canoe Trip, she offered to push the pig family's boat due to the strong current. In Clubhouse Adventure, she and Mr. Lion look for the penguins and encourage the children to help them. Though she often means well, Mrs. Crocodile can sometimes be quite frightening. In The Zoo, there is a running gag with her hinting at wanting to eat Madame Gazelle, and in Canoe Trip, she startles Mummy Pig by jumping out of the water and splashing water into her face.

Name: Greta Gazelle
Personality: She and her sister Gretel are kind and sweet. When their teacher sister Madame Gazelle is in a negative situation, she seems to get worried about her. The sisters also love playing rock music.

Name: Mrs. Poodle
Personality: No description available

Name: Mrs. Hippopotamus
Personality: No description available

Name: Mr. Bison
Personality: No description available

Name: Mr Potato
Personality: He is quite friendly and he is steadfast on healthy goals for children.

Name: Pirate
Personality: TBA

Name: Super Potato
Personality: Super Potato is liked by all the children. He has a show were he tells children to eat fruits and vegetables. He also has many movies like "Vegetables in Space", he is seen telling children to eat fruits and vegetables just like his show. Although very popular, Hashbrown got more attention in Hollywood making him a little jealous.

Name: Signor Stag
Personality: TBA

Name: Father Christmas
Personality: No description available

Name: The Queen
Personality: The Queen is polite, kind, and caring. In The Queen, she was calm but a little bit excited to see Peppa and her friends. She didn't mind being asked questions by them and enjoyed being complimented about her palace. She likes to knit and take nature walks in her free time. At first, the Queen found mud and getting dirty unpleasant but changed her mind after Peppa introduced her to jumping in muddy puddles. The Queen respects people who work hard, as seen in the Queen, when she awarded Miss Rabbit a medal for her numerous, 24-hour community jobs in Peppatown. She is shown to be fond of Miss Rabbit and befriends her in The Queen. The Queen is proud of her city, London, and kindly offers to take Miss Rabbit and the children on a tour of London herself. She is brave and willing to take risks, as seen in London, when she managed to launch a heavy bus over a split-up bridge. The Queen enjoys having a good time and is often willing to help those she cares for.

Name: Mr. Scarecrow
Personality: Mr. Scarecrow is a scarecrow made by Peppa Pig, George, Granny Pig, and Grandpa pig who is good at scaring birds from grandpa's plants.

Name: Mademoiselle Potato
Personality: No description available

Name: Banana
Personality: No description available

Name: Mrs Carrot
Personality: Mrs. Carrot is the wife of Mr. Potato.

Name: Little Sprout
Personality: He seems quite mischievous and "cheeky", playing peekaboo in Mr. Potato's Christmas Show.

Name: Tomato
Personality: No description available

Name: Sweet Cranberry
Personality: Not much is known about Sweet Cranberry, but she has been shown to be fairly nice and caring, particularly to Little Sprout.

Name: Lotte
Personality: Lotte is a kind and friendly llama. When she sees Peppa watching her, she goes and says hi to her. She talks to the children and answers all their questions, which proves her friendliness and kindness. Lotte is also quite proud of being able to speak German and is also a good teacher because all the children knew how to speak basic German by the end of the episode at playgroup. She also has a way of making things fun, like during recess, she showed the children a fun way of learning German numbers by playing hopscotch. Even though she enjoyed the attention, Lotte was a bit shy at first to see all the new children and at a new playgroup, but she was quick to open up to everyone.

Name: Penny Polar Bear
Personality: Penny Polar Bear is kindhearted and inclusive to others. She enjoys sharing her thoughts and opinions and also likes to give compliments. In Weather Station, she shares how she likes snowy weather the best, and in Families, she shares about her family. In Igloo, she compliments Peppa on her built igloo. However, she can also be argumentative at times, as seen in Playgroup Garden, where she, Danny, and Peppa get into a fight regarding which of their sunflowers are the tallest.

Name: Funny Onion
Personality: No description available

Name: Dino Roar
Personality: No description available

Name: Grandpa Pig's Robot
Personality: No description available

Name: Suzy
Personality: Suzy Sheep is kind, caring, supportive, and inclusive, which makes her a good friend. In Flying on Holiday, she rings the doorbell multiple times hoping to see Peppa home from her vacation. In Pumpkin Competition, when the playgroup must start an evening pumpkin contest without Peppa, Suzy expresses sadness. However, in School Camp, Suzy asks to camp with the other girls from playgroup instead of Peppa, and near the end of the episode, she becomes scared after hearing an owl near her tent and rushes to Madame Gazelle's tent without telling Peppa. She has a bossy side, which can be seen in multiple episodes. In Chatterbox, she bullies Peppa over not being able to be silent, and argues with the playgroup in International Day. She is easily annoyed and likes to take control of situations. In When I Grow Up, Suzy shares that she would like to be a nurse to help sick people get better, and also to tell people what to do. She communicates by using M's instead of B's while bleating.

Name: Gabriella
Personality: Gabriella is a kindhearted and friendly goat. This is seen in Holiday in the Sun, when she introduces herself to the pig family and teaches them, specifically Peppa, about Italian traditions, such as what they like to eat. She helps Peppa choose a postcard to write to Goldie when she hears that she misses her. Later on in the episode, after the pig family leave the local village, Gabriella tells her father that Peppa forgot Teddy. She kindly gives Teddy to a police officer, who returns it to her. In The End of the Holiday, Gabriella waves the pig family goodbye as they leave the vacation house. She also discovers once again that Peppa forgot Teddy, and she gives it back to the police officer, who returns it back to Peppa.

Name: Ms Pineapple
Personality: No description available

Name: Miss Rabbit
Personality: Miss Rabbit is a kind and polite person, who always works very hard, on each of her many jobs.

Name: Mrs. Badger
Personality: Mrs. Badger is kind, patient, and sweet to children, as seen in The Petting Farm. She enjoys spending time with animals, being a farmer, and singing. Mrs. Badger is a persuasive seller, as seen when she tries to convince Mummy and Daddy Pig to buy her guinea pigs.

Name: Mr. Raccoon
Personality: No description available
